User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Note: deprecated age/height-specific template pages used to be listed here
# as Disallow entries. They are now handled via 301 redirects in _redirects
# instead, which properly consolidates them into the hub pages (rather than
# blocking crawl access while also relying on a canonical tag Google could
# never actually see).

Sitemap: https://healthybmicheck.com/sitemap.xml
